filesModified.purpose: Replaced theme-specific Tailwind classes with portable standard classes
Replaced theme-specific Tailwind classes with portable standard classes (PHP sync)

warnings: No new warnings in DemoContainer files
Existing unrelated linter warnings in other blocks remain unchanged

syncStatus.note: Both TSX and PHP updated with identical portable class changes

classReplacements.rationale: Replaced custom typography token (text-header-4) with standard Tailwind size (text-xl) and weight (font-bold). Replaced custom color token (text-charcoal) with text-current to inherit color from parent context.

Replaced custom typography token (text-body) with standard Tailwind size (text-base). Replaced custom color token with opacity (text-charcoal/60) with opacity-60 utility to achieve same visual effect while inheriting base color.
Replaced custom color token (border-charcoal/10) with standard Tailwind neutral gray scale (border-neutral-300) for a clean, portable separator.

portabilityImprovements.summary: Block is now fully portable across themes without requiring custom color or typography tokens
portabilityImprovements.colorStrategy: Uses text-current to inherit text color from parent/body, and opacity-60 for muted text effect
portabilityImprovements.typographyStrategy: Uses standard Tailwind size and weight utilities (text-xl, font-bold, text-base) instead of custom tokens
portabilityImprovements.borderStrategy: Uses standard neutral color scale (border-neutral-300) for visual separation
portabilityImprovements.benefitToThemes: Block can be used in any theme with any color scheme - it will automatically adapt to the theme's base text color and provide neutral, clean styling

revisionsApplied.implementation: Replaced all instances of 'text-charcoal' with 'text-current' and 'border-charcoal/10' with 'border-neutral-300'

revisionsApplied.change: Use opacity for muted text instead of color variants
revisionsApplied.implementation: Replaced 'text-charcoal/60' with 'opacity-60' to achieve same visual effect while maintaining portability
